verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Beautiful Lord, Wonderful savior I know for sure all of my days are held in your hands Crafted into your perfect plan

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: You gently called me into your presence Guiding me by Your Holy Spirit Teach me dear Lord to live all of my life Through your eyes.

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: I'm captured by your holy calling Set me apart. I know you're calling me to yourself Lead me, Lord. I pray

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: Take me, mold me, use me, fill me I give my life to the potter's hand

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: Call me, guide me, lead me, walk beside me I give my life to the potter's hand
